title: New Craft Totes from Creative Options
excerpt: Once again I've partnered with Creative Options® to help me get organized! Yes, it is a work in progress always, but I have to say I have gotten a lot better at (mostly) putting things back where they belong. My…
body:
Once again I've partnered with Creative Options® to help me get organized! Yes, it is a work in progress always, but I have to say I have gotten a lot better at (mostly) putting things back where they belong. My biggest challenge seems to be more the accumulation and piling up of the stuff more than anything else. Creative Options® has fashionable and functional storage solutions perfect for crafts of all kinds and gift giving. I even used one of the totes to show how it can be a travel treasure chest for Jack! Here are the new totes they sent over. 

The Total Tote in Vineyard is so versatile and functional. It features hybrid construction, which combines the look of a soft-sided organizer with the rigid body of a Creative Options molded product. The result is clever storage that keeps its shape. It's "tote-ally" awesome and available in-stores at Joann Fabric and Crafts.

I used the Crochet Tote in Viva La Pink print as a planning kit as well as for crocheting. It's available in-stores and online here at Joann Fabrics and Crafts.

The Knitting Needle Roll Up in Viva La Pink print is available on Amazon and at Joann.

The Tapered Tote in "Viva La Pink" is sold out online but available at Michaels.

Large Signature 5-Pocket Tote in Andee Cool print is available in-stores at Hobby Lobby and online at Joann and Walmart.

Here's the video showing all of the totes in action. To find out more about Creative Options® Storage Solutions go to: http://www.CreativeOptionsCrafts.com. For crafting tips, giveaways, and product news, 'Like' Creative Options® on Facebook.

You can also see how some creative friends styled their totes in these posts by One Happy Mama, My Purpley Life, and All For The Memories.

DISCLAIMER: This post is sponsored by Creative Options. As always, all thoughts and opinions are my own.
